title: MinerU PDF Parser
description: Serverless MinerU 3.1.x with the MinerU2.5-Pro-2604-1.2B VLM. PDF, image, DOCX, PPTX, XLSX → Markdown + JSON. Scales to zero, ~$0.0003/page on 24 GB Ampere serverless.

input.name: HuggingFace token
input.description: Optional. Only needed if you want to pull gated or private models (e.g. a fine-tune of MinerU on your own corpus). The default model is public.

input.name: MinerU model source
input.description: Where MinerU pulls weights from. 'huggingface' works everywhere; 'modelscope' is a faster mirror in China; 'local' needs a mineru.json + pre-staged snapshots (offline setups).

input.name: VLM model override
input.description: Override the VLM model name. Used only by the vlm-http-client and hybrid-http-client backends; vlm-auto-engine ignores this and loads MinerU's default.

input.name: S3 endpoint URL (optional)
input.description: Endpoint URL for an S3-compatible bucket. Required only if callers request `return: "s3"`. Works with AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, MinIO, etc.

input.name: S3 bucket name (optional)
input.description: Name of the S3-compatible bucket to upload to. Required only if callers will request `return: "s3"`.

input.name: S3 access key ID (optional)
input.description: Access key ID for the S3-compatible bucket. Required only if callers will request `return: "s3"`. Stored as a worker env var; not exposed to job inputs or outputs.

input.name: S3 secret access key (optional)
input.description: Secret access key for the S3-compatible bucket. Required only if callers will request `return: "s3"`. Stored as a worker env var; not exposed to job inputs or outputs.
